## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` – new feature
- [ ] `fix` – bug fix
- [ ] `docs` – documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` – no functional change
- [ ] `test` – tests only
- [ ] `chore` – build, tooling, dependencies
